archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) mixed with Jewel & Luxury (Archetype 5)

monospace.usage: Order book, tickers, exact pricing, wallet balances

spacing_and_layout.general_strategy: Control Room Grid Protocol. Dense data needs structured hierarchy.

micro_themes.cards: Solid surface: bg-[#11151E] border border-[#1F2633] shadow-sm
micro_themes.trading_panels: Strict grid: border-collapse, minimal internal padding (p-3), monospace fonts for numbers
micro_themes.inputs: Flat solid: bg-[#0B0E14] border border-[#1F2633] focus:border-[#DCA335] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#DCA335]

components.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary: bg-[#DCA335] text-black hover:bg-[#F5B841]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1F2633] text-[#F8FAFC] hover:bg-[#1A202C].
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Zebra striping for order books to aid readability. Hover effects on rows.
components.charts: Recharts or lightweight TradingView widget for candlesticks. Use #10B981 for up candles, #EF4444 for down.
components.tabs: Underline style instead of pills for a more professional 'exchange' feel. Active tab border-bottom 2px #DCA335.
components.toast: Sonner. Dark themed, borders matching the status (e.g., green border for success).

icons.style: Duotone for marketing/empty states, Regular/Fill for functional dashboard elements.

image_urls.description: Shiny bitcoin logo on black background. Use for Login/Register split screen.
Abstract neon lines forming a digital landscape. Use selectively for marketing headers or empty states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the entire application is in Turkish as requested.
Install specific fonts via CDN or NPM: Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Implement pure dark mode using the provided color hexes. Do not use generic Tailwind 'gray' or 'slate' without overriding them to the custom navy-black theme (#070A0F base).
For the trading view, utilize a rigid multi-column layout (e.g., Left: Pairs/Markets, Middle: Chart & Order Entry, Right: Order Book & Recent Trades).
Ensure all numbers in tables, order books, and price tickers use tabular-nums and JetBrains Mono.
Implement 'data-testid' on all interactive elements like buttons, inputs, tabs, and table rows.
Use standard HTML inputs for simple text, but Shadcn UI components for dropdowns, selects, and dialogs.
Build the KYC upload zones with clear dashed borders and intuitive drag-and-drop aesthetics.
In the Deposit (Yatırma) section, ensure the IBAN, Reference Code, and Dekont (receipt) upload are distinct, secure-looking steps.
